Package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime

Class FieldMapEntry

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.FieldMapEntry
public final class FieldMapEntry extends Object
One row from a *_fieldmap.csv file. Columns (in order): 0: sheetName - Excel sheet name 1: cellRef - Excel A1-style reference (e.g. "B5") 2: fieldName - JRXML / bean field name (e.g. "cashamount") 3: javaType - fully-qualified Java type (e.g. "java.math.BigDecimal") 4: excelFormat - raw Excel data format string (may be empty) 5: dbExpr - OPTIONAL; SQL expression to compute this field (e.g. "s.opening_balance")

    • getDbExpr

      public String getDbExpr()
      Optional SQL expression for this field, e.g. "a.name" or "s.opening_balance". May be null if the CSV has only 5 columns.
      Returns:
      the db expr
